context_note: Spain vs Saudi Arabia, WC2026. Spain MASSIVE favorite: λ_ESP=3.262, λ_KSA=0.473. FTR: Spain 89.69%, Draw 7.71%, Saudi Arabia 3.51%. RULE7 FIRES (Spain 89.69% > 86%). RULE8 does NOT fire (draw=7.71%). Blowout-level mismatch similar to ECU-CUR but even more extreme. Saudi Arabia 3.51% = deep DANGER ZONE for 2+ offsides rule. Key players: Salem Al-Dawsari (KSA winger), Lamine Yamal/Mikel Oyarzabal (ESP). Al-Dawsari anytime goalscorer = 0.0711 (LIQUID). Most corners Spain=92.22% — Spain will dominate all possession/set-piece metrics.

Goalscorer_key_ESP.note: illiquid except Yamal and Oyarzabal are liquid

rules_applied.RULE7_fires: Spain 89.69% > 86% → RULE7 fires. Edge is in underdog props (Q1 KSA 2+ offsides, Q8 KSA scores 2H, Q10 Al-Dawsari scores). For Q7 (Spain wins), trust the direct FTR market.
rules_applied.NO_RULE8: Draw=7.71% well below 25% threshold. Blowout match expected.
rules_applied.Q1_KSA_offsides: Saudi Arabia 3.51% = DANGER ZONE (<5-10%). NOT the clean 10-30% organized mid-block rule. KSA has quality fast forwards (Al-Dawsari, Al-Brikan) who make counter-attack runs. Blowout reversal: KSA will push forward when 0-3+ down. λ_KSA_off≈1.2 → P(≥2)=0.337. Estimate 0.33 (crowd likely prices ~0.45).
rules_applied.Q2_ESP_more_corners_2H: Skellam: λ_ESP_corn_2H=4.33, λ_KSA_corn_2H=1.16. z=1.35, continuous P=0.911, discrete-adj=0.876. Most corners Spain=92.22%. Very strong YES. Estimate 0.88.
rules_applied.Q3_ESP_more_SOT_2H: Skellam: λ_ESP_SOT_2H=4.63, λ_KSA_SOT_2H=1.14. z=1.45, continuous P=0.927, discrete-adj=0.892. 2H result Spain=75.46%. Very strong YES. Estimate 0.89.
rules_applied.Q5_ESP_offsides: Spain attacking favorite (not defensive-underdog family). Possession football vs deep KSA block reduces offside risk. λ_ESP_off≈1.7 → P(≥2)=0.507. Estimate 0.50 (no strong edge).
rules_applied.Q7_Spain_wins: RULE7 fires (89.69%). Direct FTR Spain=0.8969. Trust market. Estimate 0.90.
rules_applied.Q8_KSA_scores_2H: Direct 2H KSA OU0.5 Over=0.2409. Trust market. Estimate 0.24. (Crowd likely over-prices at ~0.35-0.40 — big edge.)
rules_applied.Q9_8plus_total_SOT: λ_total_SOT=10.68 (calibrated from OU9.5 Over=0.6242). P(≥8|10.68)=0.835. Estimate 0.84.
rules_applied.Q10_AlDawsari_goal: Direct LIQUID anytime goalscorer market=0.0711. RULE15 applies (KSA 3.51% extreme underdog), but market is already LIQUID and very low. Trust market. Estimate 0.07.

Q1_KSA_2plus_offsides.note: DANGER ZONE (KSA 3.51% win). NOT the clean 10-30% organized mid-block family. KSA has fast forwards (Al-Dawsari, Al-Brikan) who counter-attack → offside risk. Blowout reversal pattern: KSA pushes forward from early deficit. λ_KSA_off≈1.2 → P(≥2)=0.337. Strong NO vs crowd (~0.45).

match_facts.note: Spain dominant throughout. KSA only 3 shots, 1 SOT. KSA 3 offsides - blowout reversal confirmed (3.51% underdog in deep deficit, high line, caught offside). Spain 2 offsides from attacking runs.
